original_image_tags: A worn, brown manila file folder. The folder contains multiple labels, stamps, and handwritten notations.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned manila FBI records folder cover with two large white barcode labels, red and black stamped text including “Federal Bureau of Investigation,” “DESTROY,” “USE CARE IN HANDLING THIS FILE,” and “Transfer-Call 421,” plus handwritten file markings and section numbers.*
